Description: What kind of deviation? Technology-agnostic — specifics go in ParameterName.
e.g. 'Bath pH', 'Zone 2 Temp', 'Film Thickness Cpk'. The actual parameter that deviated.

When the deviation ended. NULL = ongoing.
Product impact assessment. Drives containment/escalation decision.
Lot/batch numbers of product processed during deviation window.
How many parts are potentially affected
If this ProcDev was escalated from a QualityAlert
